sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92358" key="vrhta/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ϝρητ-άομαι</orth>, <sense id="n92358.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make a treaty</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">agreement with</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
